entry.title: Himalayan Serenity Machhapuchhre | Artistic Painting Effect | 3 Piece Set
entry.summary:
Vendor: Posterized
Type:
Price: 349.00 - 449.00 (3 variants)

Bring the silence of the Himalayas into your space with this Machhapuchhre (Fishtail Peak) 3-Panel Split Wall Art, inspired by the sacred mountains of the Annapurna range.

Featuring soft dreamy blue skies, gentle golden sunrise highlights, and prayer flags flowing across the foreground, this artwork captures the calm strength and spiritual stillness of the Himalayas.

The split-panel layout adds a modern aesthetic touch while maintaining the serene devotional mood of the mountain landscape. Perfect for desk setups, workspaces, meditation corners, or minimal interiors seeking depth and tranquility.

What You’ll Receive

• 1 Set = 3 Split Panels
• Matte, high-detail mountain print
• Soft atmospheric color grading
• Calm, premium aesthetic finish

Size & Finishing Note

We print on full sheets and manually trim white borders for a clean edge-to-edge finish.
Final dimensions may vary slightly (±0.5 inch) due to trimming.

Installation Note

Frames and wall tapes are not included.
You may add our wall-stick option at checkout for easy installation.

Perfect For

• Desk setups
• Meditation rooms
• Living room feature walls
• Mountain lovers
• Spiritual interiors
• Minimal workspaces
entry.s:tag: Guardian: The Lonely and Great God

entry.title: The Divine Vision | Krishna | Devotional | 3 Piece Set
entry.summary:
Vendor: Posterized
Type:
Price: 349.00 - 449.00 (3 variants)

Bring divine calm and spiritual presence into your space with this Krishna 3-Panel Split Wall Art, featuring a close-up of His sacred golden eyes and luminous tilak in a soft painterly devotional style.

Designed with a matte gouache-inspired finish and rich blue tones, this artwork creates a serene focal point above desks, workstations, bedrooms, or meditation corners. The split-panel layout adds a modern aesthetic touch while preserving the sacred emotion of the artwork.

The warm golden eyes, subtle blush tones, and soft lighting create a peaceful yet powerful presence that transforms any wall into a devotional sanctuary.

What You’ll Receive

• 1 Set = 3 Split Panels
• High-detail matte print finish
• Vibrant yet soft devotional color tones
• Modern minimal layout with spiritual depth

Size & Finishing Note

We print on full sheets and manually trim white borders for a clean edge-to-edge finish.
Final dimensions may vary slightly (±0.5 inch) due to trimming.

Installation Note

Frames and wall tapes are not included.
You may add our wall-stick option at checkout for easy installation.

Perfect For

• Desk setups
• Meditation corners
• Living room feature walls
• Devotional spaces
• Spiritual gifting
entry.s:tag: Guardian: The Lonely and Great God

entry.title: DHARMA | Kurkshetra | Devotional | 3 Piece Set
entry.summary:
Vendor: Posterized
Type:
Price: 349.00 - 449.00 (3 variants)

Premium high-definition wall poster of DHARMA | Kurkshetra | Devotional | 3 Piece Set designed to instantly upgrade the aesthetic of your room.

Printed on ultra-thick 300 GSM matte photo paper for rich colours, sharp detailing and a soft anti-glare finish. Long-lasting, fade-resistant and crafted to give your wall a clean, premium look with zero effort.

This poster blends perfectly into bedroom, living room, gaming setup or workspace décor. Easy to frame, perfect for collage walls, and ideal for anyone who loves aesthetic room vibes, minimal design and high-quality prints.

A great pick for personal use or gifting — made to match your vibe and elevate your space.
entry.s:tag: Guardian: The Lonely and Great God

entry.title: Messi Dominate | Football | 3 Piece Set
entry.summary:
Vendor: Posterized
Type:
Price: 349.00 - 449.00 (3 variants)

Messi Dominate Split Wall Art | 3-Piece Set

Transform your space with this bold Messi Dominate Split Wall Art, designed for fans who live and breathe greatness. This premium 3-piece set captures an iconic back-view moment of Messi standing tall in his Argentina jersey, framed against a powerful stadium atmosphere and the striking word DOMINATE in oversized typography.

 

The artwork blends motivation and fandom—perfect for gaming setups, bedrooms, studios, or office walls. Printed on high-quality material, the split design creates a modern, immersive look that instantly elevates any room.

 

Whether you’re a die-hard Messi supporter or someone who thrives on inspiration, this piece brings the energy of champions directly into your space.

entry.title: Strength Over Fear | Hanuman | Devotional | 3 Piece Set
entry.summary:
Vendor: Posterized
Type:
Price: 349.00 - 449.00 (3 variants)

Experience a powerful blend of divinity and determination with this Hanuman Inspirational Poster, crafted to capture one of the most extraordinary symbolic moments in Indian mythology. Set against a storm-filled sky and glowing cosmic energy, the artwork portrays Hanuman lifting an entire mountain with effortless grace, a reminder of how purpose transforms ordinary strength into something truly extraordinary.

The Hindi quote
“जिसे जगत बोझ समझता है, मैं उसे अपनी जिम्मेदारी मानता हूँ।”
paired with the English line
“Strength is born the moment fear is replaced by purpose.”
adds emotional depth, making this piece not just visual art, but a daily reminder of courage, responsibility, and unwavering devotion.

With dramatic lighting, expansive composition, and divine atmosphere, this poster becomes a centerpiece in any room—perfect for those who seek motivation, spiritual grounding, and a constant symbol of inner power.

Ideal for homes, offices, gyms, meditation rooms, study spaces, or as a meaningful gift for someone who believes in rising above fear and living with purpose.
entry.s:tag: Guardian: The Lonely and Great God

entry.title: Cristiano Ronaldo | CR7 | Football | 3 Piece Set
entry.summary:
Vendor: Posterized
Type:
Price: 349.00 - 449.00 (3 variants)

Level up your space with this dynamic football-inspired poster featuring bold stadium lighting, dramatic shadows and the iconic “RONALDO 7” jersey text. The powerful back-view composition and large “CRISTIANO” typography give the artwork a strong, motivational presence that fits perfectly in gaming rooms, bedrooms or sports setups.

Printed on premium 300 GSM matte photo paper, it delivers sharp detailing, rich colours and a smooth anti-glare finish. Ideal for fans of high-energy football art, inspirational sports decor and premium wall aesthetics.
